goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 20:15' and should go to 'cambridge'.
The train should depart from 'london kings cross' and should leave on 'sunday'.
Make sure you get 'travel time'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should have 'a star of 1'.
The hotel should 'include free wifi'.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'a star of 4'.
Once you find the 'hotel' you want to book it for '7 people' and '3 nights' starting from 'the same day'.
If the booking fails how about 'saturday'.
Make sure you get the 'reference number'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 20:15 and should go to cambridge
The train should depart from london kings cross and should leave on sunday
Make sure you get travel time
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should have a star of 1
The hotel should include free wifi
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4
Once you find the hotel you want to book it for 7 people and 3 nights starting from the same day
If the booking fails how about saturday
Make sure you get the reference number
